Job Description: What we’re looking for; In keeping with our current business needs, we are looking for a person who meets the criteria indicated below Reporting to the Chief Enterprise & Public Sector Officer , the role purpose is as highlighted below; Th e Lead Wholesale & Carrie r is strategically accountable for driving sustainable growth, margin integrity, and partnership excellence across Safaricom’s wholesale and carrier business portfolio, including interconnect, roaming, capacity services, and international voice and data revenue streams. The role leads the development and execution of wholesale and carrier strategy, optimizing monetization of Safaricom’s network assets and international connectivity footprint. It ensures disciplined commercial structuring, regulatory compliance, partner performance governance, and cross-border revenue expansion across Kenya and regional markets. Operating within a highly technical and regulated environment, the role manages domestic and international carrier relationships, interconnect settlements, roaming agreements, capacity sales, and cross-network commercial frameworks to maximize revenue realization while protecting cost structures and risk exposure. The Lead Wholesale & Carrier partners closely with Technology (Network & Core), Finance, Risk, Regulatory & External Affairs, Legal, and M-Pesa Africa to ensure commercial alignment, settlement accuracy, dispute resolution efficiency, and long-term partnership sustainability.
